That changes next month. Supergiant Games has confirmed that Hades II will release on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S on April 14, 2026.Jun 9, 2026"},"results":[{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Supergiant_Games","title":"Supergiant Games - Wikipedia","content":"It was founded in 2009 by Amir Rao and Gavin Simon, and is known for the games Bastion, Transistor, Pyre, Hades and Hades II.
Supergiant Games was formed in 2009 by Amir Rao and Gavin Simon, both previously of EA Los Angeles, where they were involved with the Command & Conquer series.
Supergiant's next game, Hades, was revealed at The Game Awards 2018 and released on September 17, 2020, following an early access release from December 2018.
"Transistor from Supergiant Games gets a reveal trailer".
"Bastion and Transistor dev announces RPG Pyre".
"Hades is a new game from the makers of Pyre and Transistor, and it's out now in early access".
"Hades II just keeps getting better"."},{"url":"https://games.gg/news/hades-2-ps5-xbox-release-date/#:~:text=Hades%20II%20spent%20the%20better,S%20on%20April%2014%2C%202026.","title":"Hades 2 Coming to PS5 and Xbox After Switch 2 Exclusivity | GAMES.GG","content":"Hades II spent the better part of six months as a Nintendo Switch 2 console exclusive.
The game will also be available on Xbox Game Pass at launch, meaning subscribers can jump in on day one at no extra cost.
The console release includes every post-launch patch that's already shipped on PC and Switch 2 since the game's original September 25, 2025 launch.
Hades II will be available on Xbox Game Pass at launch on April 14, 2026, alongside its PS5 and Xbox Series X|S release.
From Switch 2 exclusive to full console rollout
The original launched in September 2020 after spending nearly two years in PC Early Access starting in December 2018.
When it launched on September 25, 2025, it did so as a timed console exclusive on Nintendo Switch 2.
For anyone who's been holding off on a Switch 2 purchase specifically to play Hades II, April 14 is the date to circle."},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/videos/hades-2-official-ps5-and-xbox-series-xs-release-date-trailer-xbox-partner-preview-showcase-2026","title":"Hades 2 - Official PS5 and Xbox Series X|S Release Date Trailer | Xbox Partner Preview Showcase 2026 - IGN","content":"IGNhttps://www.ign.com · Mar 26, 2026IGNhttps://www.ign.com · Mar 26, 20261:07Hades 2 is launching on April 14 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Xbox Cloud, and Xbox on PC, with the game being available now on ...
Hades 2 is launching on April 14 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Xbox Cloud, and Xbox on PC, with the game being available now on Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC."},{"url":"https://sea.ign.com/hades-ii/240546/video/hades-2-official-ps5-and-xbox-series-xs-release-date-trailer-xbox-partner-preview-showcase-2026","title":"Hades 2 - Official PS5 and Xbox Series X|S Release Date Trailer | Xbox Partner Preview Showcase 2026","content":"Don't miss the PS5 and Xbox Series X|S Release Date Trailer for Hades 2, the hit sequel to the action-adventure roguelike developed by Supergiant Games."},{"url":"https://www.supergiantgames.com/blog/hades-ii-coming-to-xbox-playstation-april-14/","title":"Hades II Coming to Xbox & PlayStation on April 14! | Supergiant Games","content":"We're very excited to announce that Hades II is coming to Xbox Series X|S + Game Pass and PlayStation 5 on April 14!
Xbox and PlayStation players will soon find out why our first-ever sequel became the best-reviewed game of 2025 according to Metacritic and OpenCritic, following its v1.0 launch on PC, Nintendo Switch 2, and Nintendo Switch on September 25 last year.
Hades II for Xbox Series X and PlayStation 5 run at an ultrafast 120 frames per second, and these latest versions also include some bonus content and quality-of-life improvements we've been working on in the meantime!
Hades II for Xbox and PlayStation has been our focus since last year's v1.0 launch, during which time the game earned numerous industry accolades, including Best Action Game at The Game Awards and the D.I.C.E."},{"url":"https://www.techpowerup.com/347774/hades-2-gets-xbox-and-playstation-5-console-launch-date","title":"Hades 2 Gets Xbox and PlayStation 5 Console Launch Date","content":"Mar 26, 2026 — Now, as of April 14, 2026, almost exactly two years after the Early Access launch, Hades 2 will also be available on PlayStation 5 and Xbox ...Read more"}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Hades II console release dates PlayStation 5 Xbox Series Switch 2 PC launch timeline","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hades_II","title":"Hades II - Wikipedia","content":"# *Hades II*. | Release | * **macOS, Switch, Switch 2, Windows** * September 25, 2025 * **PS5, Xbox Series X/S** * April 14, 2026 |. ***Hades II*** is a 2025 roguelike action role-playing game developed and published by Supergiant Games, serving as a sequel to *Hades \"Hades (video game)\")* (2020), making it the studio's first sequel. Announced in December 2022, it initially released in early access for Windows in May 2024 and for macOS in October 2024. The full game released in September 2025 for both platforms alongside Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2, and later for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S in April 2026. The game follows Melinoë \"Melinoë (Hades)\"), Princess of the Underworld and sister to Zagreus \"Zagreus (Hades)\"), the protagonist of the first game. Like the first game \"Hades (video game)\"), *Hades II* is a roguelike dungeon crawler game. The player controls Melinoë \"Melinoë (Hades)\"), Princess of the Underworld and sister to the protagonist of the first game, Zagreus \"Zagreus (Hades)\").","score":0.9195344,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.threads.com/@gamer_socialclub/post/DW-SzP9mP8J/supergiant-games-have-revealed-the-global-launch-times-for-hades-i-is-arrival?hl=en","title":"Hades II Global Console Launch Times Revealed","content":"Apr 10, 2026 — Supergiant Games have revealed the global launch times for Hades II's arrival on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S.","score":0.8266142,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://wccftech.com/hades-2-ps5-xbox-series-release-date-xbox-partner-preview","title":"Hades 2 Arrives on Xbox and PlayStation Next Month","content":"Mar 26, 2026 — Hades 2 will finally make its debut on PlayStation and Xbox consoles next month, on April 14, 2026. when it launches.","score":0.82082915,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.gamespot.com/articles/hades-2-release-date-set-for-september-25-launching-first-for-switch-2-on-console/1100-6533578","title":"Hades 2 Release Date Set For September 25, Launching ...","content":"Sep 12, 2025 — Hades 2 will launch digitally for Switch 2 and the original Switch on September 25.
